title: Helldivers 2 Stratagems
description: This mod adds a couple of stratagems from the hit game Helldivers 2
body:
![JOIN THE HELLDIVERS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da17cf94d0c3523ad0f041e04c412a9fd90a3240.png)

# The Helldivers 2 Stratagems are coming into MINECRAFT.

Currently there are only 3 Stratagems:

**-Eagle 500kg Bomb**
![500kg Bomb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c9672ca62f18fa18e1f6aaf10bcf9cf3ded3d93.png)

**-Eagle Airstrike**
![Airstrike](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55613b06f2d5b298cc6570231dcd5c7908d51add.png)

**-Orbital Precision Strike**
![Precision Strike](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83c4fb22a536a0794fa5c708e2d34af05c0e1500.png)
